headline: BRK.B Reshuffles Portfolio: Focuses on Stability and Diversification?

headline: The Bull Case For Travelers (TRV) Could Change Following Margin Gains And Buybacks Boosting EPS
summary: Recently, Travelers Companies reported that its pre-tax profit margins have improved and earnings per share have increased, supported by an active share repurchase program and expectations of faster book value per share growth. This combination of stronger profitability metrics and capital returns appears to distinguish Travelers within the insurance sector relative to peers facing weaker growth profiles. Next, we will examine how Travelers' stronger earnings and margin profile after this...
